notes: This package contains the reset-chat memory that currently exists in the repository.
The repository does not contain raw per-chat transcript exports.
The integrated context layer is the canonical durable record of the prior chats.

reset_chats_present.summary: #war-room is the operating channel for deal ops and hype.
Jonathan and Heaven are part of the notification flow on updates.
GHL owns SMS, with the War Room SMS workflow still blocked pending creation.
Cursor, GHL, Comet, Website, and Zapier boundaries are locked.
deal-hunter is active for scheduled B2B lead generation.
The reliable roofer dedicated HTML deck is the proposal standard.
Desktop handles local and UI work; cloud handles autopilot operations.
FLA-2026-102 through 107 are locked state references for follow-up and close watch.

commit_timeline.message: Build Deal Machine: GHL-first automation with Stripe payment close pipeline
Lock zero-overlap orchestration: Comet/GHL/Cursor boundaries + client fulfillment
Wire war-room channel and execute enrichment queue clearance
Wire War Room SMS alerts to Jonathan + Heaven via GHL tag trigger
Switch War Room SMS to GHL only - RingCentral texting disabled
Add full GHL workflow analysis and registry
Confirm pipeline accuracy and lock Zapier to war-room only
Reposition war-room as sales hype channel - aggressive posting policy
Heaven triple-notify on every war room update: SMS + email + Slack DM
Jonathan triple-notify: SMS + email + Slack DM on every update
Enable Cursor-owned deal-hunter B2B lead gen automation
Add canonical proposal template memory (Reliable Roofer gold standard)
Integrate all flux-web chats into unified context layer
Add step-by-step automation setup guide for Cursor Automations
Mark main merged; add copy-paste automation prompts for Cursor Automations UI
War-room only: monster sales hype mode, no Slack DMs, simple guide for Jonathan
